accounts.note: Khách demo từ static-seed (demo_user1..40), KHÔNG dùng demo_customer_

noteSeederAll: db:seed:all đã gồm các file AI trên (theo timestamp). Chỉ chạy lẻ khi cần seed lại phần AI.

bookingRec.expect: Gợi ý 19h + chi nhánh 1 (sau bulk seed)

productPersona.expect: Gợi ý SP chưa mua (cước, balo…)

boughtTogether.viewProduct: Yonex Nanoflare Skill Vợt cầu lông Yonex (id ~10000)

verifySql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS demo_user FROM Users WHERE username LIKE 'demo_user%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS demo_customer FROM Users WHERE username LIKE 'demo_customer_%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bookings WHERE note LIKE '%AI-BULK-TRAIN%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OrderGroups WHERE note LIKE '%AI-BULK-TRAIN%' AND status='PAID';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OrderGroups WHERE note LIKE '%AI-PRODUCT-PATTERN%' AND status='PAID';
